subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Thou in Whose grasp lie the reins of the hearts of all nations! I beseech Thee by Thy Most Great Name through which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا من فی قبضتک زمام افئده الامم اسئلک باسمک الاعظم الذی به تنور
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for assistance; intercession
